TypeMapReadRule.description: A read rule: `native` matches, `canonical` renders (Arrow vocabulary).
TypeMapReadRule.title: TypeMapReadRule

description: Public JSON Schema contract for a connector's `type-map-read.json` — the read direction (native → canonical) of its type-map pair, a top-level array of `{match, native, canonical}` rules, order significant (first match wins). The full per-rule contract (ECMA-262 regex, `${name}` capture correspondence, canonical vocabulary, schemaless-container handling) lives in the model and is enforced by the connector validator; this published schema is the structural projection. Source of truth: k2m.models.type_map.TypeMapReadDoc (Pydantic).
title: Analitiq Type Map (read)
